summary: Homepage navigation testing to verify successful access to voter registration, provincial election report, local elections, and resources pages

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Register to Vote button successfully navigates to the voter registration page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Register to Vote button in the page header
validations: The page displays the Register to Vote heading
The page displays voter registration information and requirements
The left sidebar menu shows 2024 Provincial Election navigation options

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Learn more button in the 2024 Provincial Election Report banner successfully navigates to the provincial election detail page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Learn more button in the 2024 PROVINCIAL ELECTION REPORT banner
validations: The page displays the 2024 PROVINCIAL ELECTION heading
The page displays provincial election report information and volumes
The left sidebar menu shows 2024 Provincial Election navigation options

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Learn more button in the 2026 General Local Elections card successfully navigates to the local elections page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Learn more button in the 2026 GENERAL LOCAL ELECTIONS card
validations: The page displays the 2026 GENERAL LOCAL ELECTIONS heading
The page displays local elections information and key dates table
The left sidebar menu shows Local Elections navigation options

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Resources link in the main navigation menu successfully navigates to the resources page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Resources link in the main navigation menu
validations: The page displays the RESOURCES heading
The page displays resource categories description text
The left sidebar menu shows expandable resource categories including Maps, Forms & Guides, Results, Voters List, Reports, and Legislation

summary: Voter registration page access testing to verify successful navigation from homepage

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Register to Vote button successfully navigates to the voter registration page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Register to Vote button in the page header

summary: Provincial election report page access testing to verify successful navigation from homepage banner

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Learn more button in the 2024 Provincial Election Report banner successfully navigates to the provincial election detail page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Learn more button in the 2024 PROVINCIAL ELECTION REPORT banner

summary: Local elections navigation testing to verify successful access to local elections page and local forms page via sidebar menu

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Learn more button in the 2026 General Local Elections card successfully navigates to the local elections page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Learn more button in the 2026 GENERAL LOCAL ELECTIONS card

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Local Forms link in the sidebar menu successfully navigates to the local election forms page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Learn more button in the 2026 GENERAL LOCAL ELECTIONS card
Click the Local Forms link in the left sidebar menu
validations: The page displays the LOCAL FORMS heading
The page displays a table with columns for Filer type, Report type(s), and Forms
The page displays a dropdown selector labeled Select filer type
normalization_notes: Local Forms is a sidebar link visible after navigating to the local-elections page.

summary: Local election forms page access testing to verify successful navigation from local elections page sidebar

content.objective: Verify that navigating to the local election forms page via the 2026 General Local Elections card and sidebar menu is successful, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Learn more button in the 2026 GENERAL LOCAL ELECTIONS card
Click the Local Forms link in the left sidebar menu

summary: Resources page access testing to verify successful navigation from main navigation menu

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Resources link in the main navigation menu successfully navigates to the resources page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the Resources link in the main navigation menu
